data.name: Benefitship: The Hallowed Wiener
data.detailed_description:
In this sequel to Benefitship, the story of Amy and Chloe continues as an old friend of Amy's comes back into her life, sparking plenty of sexual tension.

With a hot body and a fun, teasing personality, Erica has spent many late nights with guys and girls alike. Having invited her old friend Amy to a Halloween party, she's looking forward to meeting both her... and her new roommate.

Chill, extroverted, and slightly tomboyish, Amy is Chloe's bubbly and fun roommate. She's up for almost anything, and that statement has never rung more true since moving in with Chloe.

Voiced by Baku Satsu.

An extremely shy introvert with an insatiable love of sex. As a futanari, she's lucky enough to be rooming with Amy, with whom she's started a very intimate friendship. With plenty of benefits.

Voiced by Gina Galore.

  • High-quality futa x female content, illustrated by Sulcate in full HD, 1080p.

  • ~20.000 words of cute and wholesome fun.

  • Full voice acting and narration. (Optional)

  • NSFW & SFW sound effects. (Optional)

  • 25+ unique CG illustrations (not including alts).

  • A range of sexy outfits and emotive expressions for all characters.

data.short_description: A futa x female friends-with-benefits visual novel that blends wholesome with horny. Illustrated by Sulcate and fully voiced.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 350 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
